title: The Red Rider
writer: W.C. Tuttle, George H. Plympton, Vin Moore
actors: Buck Jones, Grant Withers, Marion Shilling
plot: Red Davison, the sheriff of Sun Dog, sacrifices his job and his good name to save his best friend, "Silent" Slade from the hangman's noose, following a framed-up court decision which sentences Slade to hang for the murder of Scott...
